description.value:
Frequency once per day

Trigger You're reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect You release a burst of stellar energy, incinerating your surroundings as you fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious]. You deal 1d6 fire damage plus your level (@Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)d6+@actor.level)[fire]|options:area-damage]) to all other creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] (@Check[reflex|against:class-spell|basic] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC). At 3rd level, and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d6.
